causalAutopsy.notes: The lease pull/broadcast transport shipped in the cross-machine seamlessness era without per-attempt cost bounds: per-attempt failure logging and no abort timeout were designed-in gaps, not regressions from any PR. Surfaced by the 2026-06-05 loop-safety audit (CMT-1109) after the same-day reaper and live-tail flood incidents established the signature; the hung-socket wedge risk was latent and never observed live.
